caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, stylized wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a recording studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks while facing slightly to his left. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a stand. The background is a wall covered in various framed photographs. On the left and right sides of the scene, red and white logos featuring the text "TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" are visible. In the background, white clothing items on hangers and a yellow garment with the word "LEE" are visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, subtly shifting his facial expression and head posture as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
